rootCause: Playwright preview builds invoked Astro directly without refreshing frontend/src/generated/build_meta.json. Routes that fetch /build-meta.json (notably chat) returned HTTP 503, which surfaced as console errors and caused nav-route smoke automation to fail despite otherwise healthy navigation.
resolution: Updated setup-test-env to resolve and write build metadata before ensuring Astro build artifacts, so Playwright preview runs always include valid build metadata and /build-meta.json responds successfully during E2E suites.
